channel.title: Channel Management
channel.subtitle: Channels define platform-level external delivery context, targets, enabled module surfaces, and bound OAuth apps.
channel.create.title: Create Channel
channel.create.subtitle: Start small: create the channel first, then attach targets and bindings below.
channel.runtime.title: Runtime Context
channel.runtime.subtitle: Channel resolved by middleware for the current request.
channel.runtime.empty: No channel was resolved for the current request yet.
channel.runtime.name: Name
channel.sourceDescription.headerId: The current request explicitly selected this channel through the X-Channel-ID header.
channel.sourceDescription.headerSlug: The current request explicitly selected this channel through the X-Channel-Slug header.
channel.sourceDescription.query: The current request selected this channel through the query parameter fallback.
channel.sourceDescription.host: The current request matched this channel through host-based target resolution.
channel.sourceDescription.policy: The current request matched a tenant-scoped typed channel resolution policy.
channel.sourceDescription.default: No explicit channel selector matched, so the tenant's explicit default channel was used.
channel.feedback.default: Channel `{slug}` is now the tenant default channel.
channel.feedback.oauthSaved: OAuth app binding saved for channel `{channel}`.
channel.feedback.oauthUpdated: OAuth app binding updated for channel `{channel}`.
channel.feedback.oauthRevoked: OAuth app binding `{app}` revoked for channel `{channel}`.
channel.card.defaultDescription: Used as the tenant's explicit default channel when no header, query or host selector matches.
channel.targets.title: Targets
channel.targets.emptyBody: Add the first target to make this channel discoverable through a concrete delivery surface.
channel.modules.title: Module Bindings
channel.modules.emptyBody: Bindings are optional in v0. Add one when this channel should explicitly enable or disable a module surface.
channel.modules.noDescriptors: No module descriptors are currently available for binding.
channel.oauth.title: OAuth Apps
channel.oauth.emptyBody: Bind an existing OAuth app when this channel needs an integration-level relationship without introducing a second credential subsystem.
channel.oauth.noApps: No active OAuth apps are available for this tenant yet.
channel.policies.feedback.ruleReordered: Rule order updated for policy set `{slug}`.
